case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $275,300.00

DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON INTERESTED PARTY KATELYN WILLIAMS (18-007) (TRANSACTION ID # 62999262) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE ON INTERESTED PARTY NICHOLAS ADAMS (TRANSACTION ID # 63045410) FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $180,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY MICHAEL GAINES ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT DAVID ADAMS. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $95,300.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11469 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
